results.title: Elijah Craig Barrel Proof Batch C923 - Whiskey in my Wedding Ring
results.description: This is a standout batch among the modern batches (A117 and forward). The dark fruit at the end elevates the Heaven Hill notes I love about ECBP.

results.title: Elijah Craig Barrel Proof Bourbon C923 Review
results.description: Score: 8.4/10. Batch C923 was a joy to drink. It had everything I wanted in an ECBP with a little bit extra because of those fruit notes.

results.title: Review #2321 - Elijah Craig Barrel Proof 13 Year C923 : r/bourbon
results.description: Taste: Rich on the palate, viscous and powerful. Lots of cocoa, honey, toffee, red berries, cherry cola and a dash of caramel character.
